publishedAbstract: - The events for a pod is showing the PVC ran into a problem and fsck is needed to be run manually: `MountVolume.MountDevice failed for volume "pvc-XXXXxXXXX-XXxX-XXxX-xXXX-XXXXxXxxxX" /dev/rbd0: UNEXPECTED INCONSISTENCY; RUN fsck MANUALLY. (i.e., without-a or-p options). This usually results in a failed application/deployment/statefulset and failed dependent pods.`
publishedTitle: Failed PVC /dev/rbd0: UNEXPECTED INCONSISTENCY; RUN fsck MANUALLY for OCS/ODF Internal Mode
